name: oracle
liquidated_note: Legacy cohort-2026-06-29 (CXT/HDSN/J/PSN/VITL) liquidated at OPERATOR direction as part of a full-account liquidation for the 2026-07-06 god launch (not a thesis exit). Proceeds ~$1960 realized (+$161 vs entry). Positions emptied to match the now-empty broker; capital returns to the operator/treasury for reallocation. The reframed UPSIDE engine funds a separate fresh sleeve when armed (state in cache/oracle_upside_*).
